bank.retain_mission: Extract brand guidelines, visual systems, image-direction prompts, accessibility/inclusive-visuals constraints, and storytelling decisions. Capture critique outcomes and locked vs. flexible elements.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about brand voice, typography, color, illustration/photography style, accessibility requirements, and recurring visual preferences. Ignore one-off explorations.

mental_models.name: Brand & Visual System
mental_models.source_query: What are the brand guidelines, voice, typography, color, and component conventions? What is locked vs. flexible?

mental_models.name: Creative Direction
mental_models.source_query: What creative-direction patterns work for this brand? Include image-prompt conventions, storytelling beats, and accessibility/inclusion guardrails.
